scripts.dev:web: pnpm run env:dev -- vp run --filter=@apps/web dev
scripts.dev:api: pnpm run env:dev -- vp run --filter=@apps/api dev
scripts.db:generate: pnpm run env:dev -- vp run --filter=@packages/db generate
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm run env:dev -- vp run --filter=@packages/db migrate
scripts.db:push: pnpm run env:dev -- vp run --filter=@packages/db push
scripts.db:studio: pnpm run env:dev -- vp run --filter=@packages/db studio
